item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n10","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant stayed in direct execution mode, did not trigger triage or an over-methodized workflow, and provided a concrete incident analysis with main causes, deeper causes, responsibility boundaries, and remediation steps.
